description: Golden evaluation dataset for AstroSage v1.1 — curated Q&A pairs with expected evidence. Scripture IDs match graph node IDs.

categories.entity_factual: Direct factual questions about specific entities
categories.conceptual: Questions about abstract concepts and philosophy
categories.cross_scripture: Questions requiring knowledge from multiple scriptures
